advert.description: The Tesco logo is clearly visible on a teal background frame at 01:56, concluding the advertisement which features a pub spread.
The advertisement combines a spa-themed introduction with a KFC lunch deal towel; the KFC logo appears prominently on a red background at 02:24.
The McCain Factory Farm and chip tasting scenes conclude with the yellow McCain logo and slogan "Let's all chip in" at 02:56.
The travel agency's beach holiday promotion ends with the blue "On the Beach" arrow logo superimposed on the scene at 03:26.
The charity's emotional campaign featuring memory scenes concludes with the blue flower logo and name "Alzheimer's Society" at 04:25.
The promo for the original series "Renegade Nell" features fast-paced fantasy action and concludes with the white Disney+ logo on a blue background at 04:53.
The beauty segment showcasing Dove underarm creams and deodorants ends with the Unilever Home & Beauty logo next to the product cans at 05:13.
